completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith CLI, Go 1.26, MCP server, 1 part; reused cached project_type_id=cli
Inventoried existing docs (index, overview, architecture, source-tree, dev-guide, deploy-guide, 3 ADRs, SPEC_UPGRADE, README, CLAUDE.md, VERSIONING)
Tech stack unchanged: Go 1.26, stdlib only, encoding/json v1, slog, golangci-lint v2, 5 CI workflows
Deep scan: read server split (11 files, 1741 LOC), protocol/peer.go, capabilities.go, errors.go; verified v1.3.0 bidi trio surface
Source tree refreshed: 29 source + 42 test files across 9 packages; server/ file-partitioned per ADR-002
Dev/deployment info verified from Makefile, CONTRIBUTING.md, .github/workflows; added Peer/SendRequest guidance, smoke target, SLSA L3 provenance
Architecture doc rewritten for v1.3.0: Peer interface, bidi reader classifier (3-shape), capability gate (AI9), A7 outbound cancel symmetry, typed errors (AI8), AI10 progress-invariant
Supporting docs refreshed: project-overview metrics, development-guide fuzz list (5 targets) + outbound section, deployment-guide SLSA/cosign details
Index regenerated with v1.3.0 header, ADR section, updated quick-reference numbers
Validation: no (To be generated) markers; all docs dated 2026-04-18; metric consistency checked (29/42/463/5/11/37/10)

findings.project_classification: Monolith CLI, Go 1.26, MCP server, bidirectional stdin/stdout JSON-RPC 2.0
findings.technology_stack: Go 1.26, stdlib only, encoding/json, log/slog, golangci-lint v2, GitHub Actions, GoReleaser, cosign + SLSA L3, OSS-Fuzz
findings.v1_3_0_deltas: Peer interface (protocol/peer.go), ClientCapabilities snapshot (capabilities.go), typed errors (errors.go), server.go split into 11 files per ADR-002, inbound/outbound cancel symmetry (A7), AI9 capability gate, AI10 progress invariant, 5th fuzz target (Fuzz_LookupTemplate_With_ArbitraryInputs), 37 conformance scenarios (+3 bidi orphan-response)
